name: Acrobatics
summary: Acrobatics is a Dexterity-based skill used for tumbling, balancing, and similar feats of agility. It is a skill that relies on grace and control to navigate difficult terrain and avoid dangerous situations.

name: Arcana
summary: Arcana is an Intelligence-based skill used for identifying and understanding magic. It is a skill that relies on knowledge and study to navigate the complexities of the arcane arts.

name: Athletics
summary: Athletics is a Strength-based skill used for climbing, jumping, and similar feats of physical prowess. It is a skill that relies on strength and power to overcome obstacles.

name: Crafting
summary: Crafting is an Intelligence-based skill used for creating and repairing items. It is a skill that relies on knowledge and skill to create and repair objects.

name: Deception
summary: Deception is a Charisma-based skill used for lying, bluffing, and misleading others. It is a skill that relies on social manipulation to achieve one's goals.

name: Diplomacy
summary: Diplomacy is a Charisma-based skill used for persuading, negotiating, and influencing others. It is a skill that relies on social interaction to achieve one's goals.

name: Intimidation
summary: Intimidation is a Charisma-based skill used for frightening, threatening, and coercing others. It is a skill that relies on social pressure to achieve one's goals.

name: Lore
summary: Lore is an Intelligence-based skill used for recalling obscure knowledge and lore. It is a skill that relies on knowledge and study to recall information.

name: Medicine
summary: Medicine is an Intelligence-based skill used for healing wounds and treating diseases. It is a skill that relies on knowledge and skill to heal others.

name: Nature
summary: Nature is an Intelligence-based skill used for understanding and interacting with the natural world. It is a skill that relies on knowledge and skill to understand nature.

name: Occultism
summary: Occultism is an Intelligence-based skill used for understanding and interacting with the occult world. It is a skill that relies on knowledge and skill to understand the occult.

name: Performance
summary: Performance is a Charisma-based skill used for entertaining, impressing, and influencing others through performance. It is a skill that relies on social interaction to achieve one's goals.

name: Religion
summary: Religion is an Wisdom-based skill used for understanding and interacting with religious matters. It is a skill that relies on knowledge and study to understand religion.

name: Society
summary: Society is an Intelligence-based skill used for understanding and interacting with social matters. It is a skill that relies on knowledge and study to understand society.

name: Stealth
summary: Stealth is a Dexterity-based skill used for sneaking, hiding, and moving undetected. It is a skill that relies on grace and control to move undetected.

name: Survival
summary: Survival is a Wisdom-based skill used for tracking, foraging, and navigating the wilderness. It is a skill that relies on awareness and observation to survive in the wilderness.

name: Thievery
summary: Thievery is a Dexterity-based skill used for picking locks, disabling traps, and stealing. It is a skill that relies on grace and control to pick locks and disable traps.
